business.type_label: medical & healthcare bookstore (buku kedokteran & alkes) with online shop

engine.ladder_reasoning: It's a shop: the visitor's decision is made by browsing the book catalog and specialty categories, so catalog-browsing IS the conversion much like checking a store. Not selling one defined thing or expertise.

goal.one_action: browse the book catalog and order (via on-site checkout, WhatsApp, or marketplaces)

structure.archetype_note: WooCommerce storefront: home value-prop + blog teasers, category/catalog listings with pagination, product-detail pages, contact gateway routing to WhatsApp/Tokopedia/Shopee.

mapped.observed_as: Ribuan buku / Ratusan Penulis / Pemesanan Mudah
Blog teaser cards (Tips dekorasi, 5 teknologi kedokteran, 5 perpustakaan)

unmapped.observed: Buku Kedokteran / Medical Books category grids with per-specialty item counts and pagination (1..54)
unmapped.why_no_fit: canonical sectionList has no product-catalog/category-listing section — it's a shop browse surface, not a marketing section

unmapped.observed: Single product page (author/publisher/year/SKU, Stok habis, Detil/Beli)
unmapped.why_no_fit: no product-detail section in the canonical list
catalog search is a store utility, no canonical id

proposed_new.name: storefront-checkout
proposed_new.evidence: WooCommerce cart + Checkout page (checkout-2) selling one-time book goods with Beli/add-to-cart buttons; commerce.cart_or_checkout true

design_style.none_fits_because: design_hints empty (no fonts/colors captured); only light theme known — insufficient to assign one of the six styles

confidence.why: fetch_quality full; clear WooCommerce storefront with catalog, checkout, and multi-channel ordering — plainly outside the single-conversion-action ICP

gap_findings: Site is a full ecommerce storefront (catalog + cart + checkout + product/category pages) — outside the one-conversion-action ICP; taxonomy engines can't express a browse-and-buy shop.
No canonical section ids for product-category listing, product-detail, or catalog search.
Ordering is fragmented across on-site checkout, WhatsApp, Tokopedia, Shopee, Instagram — a multi-channel-order pattern not captured by the single goal mechanism.
Prices hidden on all sampled catalog/product pages (possible login/quote-gated pricing) — an ambiguity the goal model doesn't represent.
